Package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.mpclient.imports

package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.mpclient.imports
MicroProfile client import handling. The various external types used by the generated code are represented by constants (in separate enumeration types for each package). This allows for consistent references to the external types in the generator.
